en.extract:
The mountain honeyeater (Meliphaga orientalis), hill-forest honeyeater or mountain meliphaga, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae that is found throughout New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.


References


External links
ITIS report: Meliphaga orientalis.

The '''mountain honeyeater''' ('''''Meliphaga orientalis'''''), '''hill-forest honeyeater''' or '''mountain meliphaga''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]] that is found throughout [[New Guinea]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].
